rationale.Existence & Specificity: The company has clear targets for 2050 and 2025, but specific 2030 milestones for Scope 3 are not detailed.
rationale.Ambition: The targets include interim and long-term ambitions, but lack explicit alignment with a 1.5°C trajectory across all scopes.
rationale.Coverage: Scope 1, 2, and some Scope 3 targets are mentioned, but there is no detailed breakdown for majority Scope 3 categories.
rationale.Credibility & Transparency: A specific third-party validation is not mentioned, and the methodology is not clearly outlined.
rationale.Delivery/Status: There is measurable progress reported against interim targets for Scope 1 and 2, but not for Scope 3.

rationale.Existence & Specificity: The company has clear, time-bound commitments with specific target years (2025) for deforestation-free and regenerative agriculture targets.
rationale.Ambition: The ambition appears to be aligned with industry norms, but the scope and definitions are not fully detailed or provided for all areas.
rationale.Coverage: Coverage is partially satisfied as key commodities and geographic coverage details are largely marked as N/A or not disclosed.
rationale.Credibility & Transparency: Methodology, framework alignment, and other supporting details are not fully disclosed publicly, lowering transparency.
rationale.Delivery/Status: The delivery status shows some progress in regenerative agriculture (39%), but other areas lack reporting data.

rationale.Existence & Specificity: Quantified and timebound targets exist for both recyclable packaging and virgin plastic reduction with clear baselines and target years.
rationale.Ambition: Targets like 100% recyclable packaging by 2030 and a 30% reduction in virgin plastic align well with strong industry ambitions.
rationale.Coverage: While targets cover general packaging, geographic and asset coverage details are not available, leading to partial satisfaction.
rationale.Credibility & Transparency: There is alignment with some framework for packaging goals, but details on methodology validation and comprehensive reporting are lacking.
rationale.Delivery/Status: Data shows substantial progress on some targets (85% recyclability), but virgin plastic reduction is off-track and other commitments lack reporting.

rationale.Credibility & Transparency: The methodology for verification is internal, and there is no disclosed alignment with recognized frameworks or external validation.
